description: Shared config-contract corpus. Kept byte-identical between devmate and monoroot. Every fixture carries a scope tag naming who must exercise it: 'both' = the consumer validator AND the producer structural predicate; 'consumer' = devmate's validator only (the producer test skips it explicitly via this tag, never silently); 'producer-merge' = the consumer rejects it via its validator while the producer proves the rejection through its merge step (which throws) rather than its structural predicate. must-accept files validate; must-reject files fail with an error containing the mapped substring (the consumer-side message).

multi-root-missing-repo.json.error: repo must be a non-empty string in multi-root mode

multi-root-missing-primary.json.error: primary must be a non-empty string in multi-root mode

multi-root-missing-repos.json.error: repos must be a non-empty array of strings in multi-root mode

bad-check.json.error: verification.checks[0].command must be a non-empty string

session-artifact-paths-empty.json.error: sessionArtifactPaths[1] must be a non-empty string

session-artifact-writers-no-agents.json.error: sessionArtifactWriters[0].agents must be an array of agent names
